SEARCH

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Terminally Deprecated
  • Classes
  • Methods
  • Constructors
  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    opennlp.tools.namefind.NameFinderEventStream.generateOutcomes(Span[], String, int)
    use the BioCodec implementation of the SequenceValidator instead!
    opennlp.tools.sentdetect.SentenceDetectorME.getSentenceProbabilities()
    Use SentenceDetectorME.probs() instead.
    opennlp.tools.tokenize.ThreadSafeTokenizerME.getProbabilities()
    Use ThreadSafeTokenizerME.probs() instead.
    opennlp.tools.tokenize.TokenizerME.getTokenProbabilities()
    Use TokenizerME.probs() instead.
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    opennlp.tools.chunker.ThreadSafeChunkerME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, ChunkerME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
    opennlp.tools.langdetect.ThreadSafeLanguageDetectorME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, LanguageDetectorME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
    opennlp.tools.lemmatizer.ThreadSafeLemmatizerME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, LemmatizerME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
    opennlp.tools.namefind.ThreadSafeNameFinderME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, NameFinderME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
    opennlp.tools.postag.ThreadSafePOSTaggerME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, POSTaggerME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
    opennlp.tools.sentdetect.ThreadSafeSentenceDetectorME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, SentenceDetectorME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
    opennlp.tools.tokenize.ThreadSafeTokenizerME
    As of OPENNLP-1816, TokenizerME is itself thread-safe. Use it directly instead.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    opennlp.tools.namefind.NameFinderEventStream.generateOutcomes(Span[], String, int)
    use the BioCodec implementation of the SequenceValidator instead!
    opennlp.tools.sentdetect.SentenceDetectorME.getSentenceProbabilities()
    Use SentenceDetectorME.probs() instead.
    opennlp.tools.sentdetect.ThreadSafeSentenceDetectorME.getSentenceProbabilities()
    Use ThreadSafeSentenceDetectorME.probs() instead.
    opennlp.tools.tokenize.ThreadSafeTokenizerME.getProbabilities()
    Use ThreadSafeTokenizerME.probs() instead.
    opennlp.tools.tokenize.TokenizerME.getTokenProbabilities()
    Use TokenizerME.probs() instead.
    opennlp.tools.util.featuregen.CachedFeatureGenerator.getNumberOfCacheHits()
    Cache statistics are no longer tracked.
    opennlp.tools.util.featuregen.CachedFeatureGenerator.getNumberOfCacheMisses()
    Cache statistics are no longer tracked.
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    opennlp.tools.postag.DefaultPOSContextGenerator(int, Dictionary)
    Use DefaultPOSContextGenerator(Dictionary) instead.
    opennlp.tools.sentdetect.SentenceDetectorME(SentenceModel, Factory)
    Use a SentenceDetectorFactory to extend SentenceDetector functionality.
    opennlp.tools.util.featuregen.CachedFeatureGenerator(AdaptiveFeatureGenerator...)
    Use CachedFeatureGenerator(AdaptiveFeatureGenerator) instead.
